mapper.insert: INSERT INTO local_activity_schedule_template (owner_user_id, title, category_code, weekday, start_time, end_time, location_text, recurrence_rule, default_capacity, default_fee_type, reminder_minutes, status, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{ownerUserId}, #{title}, #{categoryCode}, #{weekday}, #{startTime}, #{endTime}, #{locationText}, #{recurrenceRule}, #{defaultCapacity}, #{defaultFeeType}, #{reminderMinutes}, #{status}, NOW(), NOW())
